title: AI Agents: DEAD or ALIVE? Businesses Are Still Waiting! #shorts
summary: Joao argues that advanced AI agents with sophisticated capabilities already exist today. However, businesses remain hesitant and slow to adopt these tools in practice, creating a gap between technological availability and enterprise deployment.
writeup: This short features Joao making the case that capable AI agents already exist with sophisticated functionality. The central point is the gap between technological availability and enterprise deployment: the tools are ready, yet businesses remain hesitant and slow to adopt them in practice. It frames the bottleneck as one of organizational willingness rather than technical maturity.
